title: Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners:
Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners!
